source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, given \( C1 = 5 \, \mu F \), \( C2 = 8 \, \mu F \), \( C3 = 12 \, \mu F \), \( C4 = 10 \, \mu F \), and \( C5 = 4 \, \mu F \), find the equivalent capacitance between points A and B when the switch S is closed. The equivalent capacitance is ________\mu F.
